name: notes-commander
description: macOS Notes organizer + human-in-the-loop drafts. Full read/export wiring (inventory, markdown+manifest snapshots to local storage), reorganization primitives (folderize, move, merge — dry-run first, snapshot required), an audit skill that proposes a better taxonomy, and the migrated draft-hold skill — all on one hardened AppleScript engine (silent-failure detection, transient-error retry, read-back verify).
